concerns.text: FR-007 requires sensitivity analysis to report 'false-positive/false-negative rates' but T025 only reports 'threshold sensitivity (status changes)' — semantic weakening of the FR deliverable

Constitution Principle II requires Reference-Validator Agent to run at THREE specific checkpoints (artifact write, Advancement-Evaluator, research_review→research_accepted); T039 only implements the agent without verifying checkpoint execution
SC-001 requires dataset completeness ≥95% validation; T011 only saves dataset with checksum without completeness threshold verification
FR-001 requires collecting from ≥100 repositories; T009 implements fetcher without enforcing the repository count minimum
FR-008 requires all result text to include 'associational' or 'correlational'; T026 only creates results.py file without validating all output contains required phrases
FR-006 requires VIF≥5 to flag collinearity AND describe joint relationship as descriptive; T024 only calculates/flags VIF without descriptive language enforcement
FR-009 requires ≤6h runtime completion validation; T029 only configures workflow timeout without validating actual runtime stays within constraint
Constitution Principle V requires state YAML updated_at timestamp update on artifact changes; no task implements this timestamp update
Constitution Principle VI requires timezone script version recorded in code/; T035 only validates timestamp storage without script version recording
Constitution Principle VII requires feature extraction scripts to explicitly declare API fields they read; T036 only validates output consistency without requiring field declarations
Constitution Principle III requires Repository-Hygiene Agent specifically for PII scans; T038 references generic 'PII scan enforcement' without agent specification
